description:
Perform a survival analysis on the Veterans' Administration Lung Cancer Trial dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoData\va_lungcancer.csv) using the Cox Proportional Hazards model in Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Specify 'SurvTime' as the outcome/time variable, 'Status' as the censor variable (where 1 indicates uncensored), and 'Treatment', 'Karnofsky', and 'CellType' as covariates. Save the full output to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoData\coxph_results.txt and create a summary file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoData\coxph_summary.txt using the following format:

HR_Karnofsky=0.XXXX
HR_Treatment=1.XXXX
Karnofsky_Significant=Yes/No
Treatment_Significant=Yes/No

metadata.data_source: Kalbfleisch and Prentice (1980) VA Lung Cancer Trial
